column1: # /File Retrieve a `.WK3` (Lotus 1-2-3 R3 binary) — content loads, and
# the active save target becomes "<orig>.WK3.xlsx" so the next /File
# Save converts to xlsx without overwriting the legacy file.
# Fixture FILE0001.WK3 (514 B) carries one sheet "A" with the text
# /FR loads the WK3 file. Cell content surfaces in the UI cache; the
# control panel shows the underlying value, while ASSERT_CELL reads
# the on-screen render. FILE0001.WK3 has a custom column-A width of
# ~2 chars (carried over from the source), so "Hello" renders truncated.
# Save target swap: the status line shows the prefilled save path —
# original filename plus an `.xlsx` suffix appended (NOT replacing
# `.WK3`). The original `.WK3` file is left untouched.
# /FS prefills active_path; pressing Enter writes the xlsx alongside.
